welcome:
{e_bot} Welcome to ChatFuel, {name}! The complete bot management platform for Telegram — no coding needed. What you can do:
• Build interactive menus with button actions • Collect subscriber answers step-by-step with Forms • Broadcast messages to your entire audience • Automate replies with Keyword triggers • Track growth & engagement with Analytics • Run Referral campaigns & Paid access gates • Protect your bot with Captcha & Force Join
Tap My Bots below to get started.
